name: eunoma-operator-services
description: Off-chain operator services (main + partner) for the Eunoma shielded bridge on Aptos.

scripts.build: npm run -w @eunoma/shared build && npm run -w @eunoma/main-operator build && npm run -w @eunoma/partner-operator build
scripts.test: npm run -w @eunoma/shared test && npm run -w @eunoma/main-operator test && npm run -w @eunoma/partner-operator test
scripts.tsc: npm run -w @eunoma/shared tsc && npm run -w @eunoma/main-operator tsc && npm run -w @eunoma/partner-operator tsc
